sheet_name: แบบขยายห้องน้ำ WC.1

element.description: รูปตัดห้องน้ำ WC.1 (view ①) — wall showing mirror, wall-hung basin, toilet, paper holder, bidet spray, and flexible shower head/hose
รูปตัดห้องน้ำ WC.1 (view ②) — opposite wall showing mirror, wall-hung basin, paper holder, toilet, and towel rail

warnings: Both views on this sheet are interior wall elevations/sections of the SAME single WC.1 bathroom (from the same room shown in plan on A-09/page 11) — not two separate bathrooms — so they were kept in one file rather than split, unlike the ST.1/ST.2 stair case on A-11.

The overall room dimensions (2.45m width in view ①, 2.00m width in view ②, 2.70m height in both) are clearly dimensioned and high confidence. The finer millimeter breakdown of intermediate dimension segments (e.g. the five stacked vertical numbers 0.70/1.00/0.20/0.20/0.60) is a best-effort read of small printed text and should be zoom-verified before use in any precise takeoff.
Tile/wall-finish triangle callout '2' appears on both wall elevations, matching the same unlabeled legend callout seen on the A-09 plan — the legend itself was not found on either sheet.
